title: 🔤 Divine Semantic Drift
name: Divine Semantic Drift
what_it_is: The process by which sacred words or glyphs mutate over time—shifting meaning until the original becomes unknowable, birthing new gods from misunderstood fragments.
how_to_use: his prayers no longer summon the god they once did—the words have drifted
she chants the drift-script—each syllable becomes another deity
animation_behavior: Symbols morph in place, language shifts mid-incantation, meanings flicker with usage ---
